website.name: Abroado
website.description: Your trusted study abroad and visitor visa consultancy for UK and Australia. Expert guidance for international education and travel.
website.main_purpose: Helps users apply for Study Visas and Visitor Visas to the UK and Australia, providing end-to-end guidance from university selection to visa approval.

branding.mission: To help students achieve international education goals through trusted and personalized guidance.
branding.vision: To become a leading overseas education consultancy for global study opportunities.

navigation.description: Hero section with statistics and overview.
Company mission, expertise, leadership, and success rate.
Study Visa, Visitor Visa, IELTS/PTE preparation.
Study and travel destinations including UK and Australia.
Student reviews and successful visa cases.
Enquiry form, office location, and Google Maps.

services.name: Study Visa
services.description: End-to-end guidance from university selection to visa approval.

services.name: Visitor Visa
services.description: Visitor visa support for tourism, family visits, and business travel.

services.name: IELTS Preparation
services.description: Training and support for IELTS and PTE exams.

services.name: Application Assistance
services.description: Application editing, SOP guidance, and documentation support.

services.name: Accommodation Support
services.description: Accommodation sourcing assistance for international students.

leadership.background: Previously worked with Education Centre of Australia (ECA). Former NCC Airwing Cadet Warrant Officer.
awards: Platinum Partner Award from Education Centre of Australia

age_limits.postgraduate: Up to 30-35 years depending on university

special_conditions: University of Tasmania may not accept high-risk region applicants or Gujarati medium students.
Victoria University, USC, UC, APIC, and CHS may restrict applicants from Haryana and specific districts.
Kurukshetra University and Punjabi University accepted subject to verification.

education_loans.loan_type: Non-collateral and unsecured loans accepted with full disbursement proof.

income_rules.agricultural_income: Accepted up to 30-40% if from parents only.

gs_interview_questions: Why did you choose Australia over other countries?
Which universities did you compare before choosing?
What subjects will you study in your first year?
What are your work rights during studies?
Who are your financial sponsors and their income?
How will this course help your career in India?

dont: Do not say choices were based only on friends or agents.

policies.refund: Refunds on eligible consultancy cancellations processed within 7 business days.
policies.privacy: User data is protected and not shared with unauthorized third parties.

faqs.question: What services does Abroado offer?
faqs.answer: Study visas, visitor visas, IELTS/PTE preparation, university selection, SOP guidance, visa processing, accommodation support, and pre-departure briefing.

faqs.question: Which countries does Abroado specialize in?
What is Abroado's visa success rate?
How can I book a consultation?
faqs.answer: Use the contact form or call +91 7778832033.

faqs.question: Who can sponsor study abroad expenses?
faqs.answer: Parents, spouse, siblings, grandparents, self, and certain biological relatives.
